backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the DroneWash Dashboard backend, defining all data types (Job, Expense, Quote, Invoice, Contract, etc.) and persistent state with full CRUD operations, financial metrics, fund management, access control, and reporting functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed, used for build or audit tracking purposes.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and key implementation details for build planning reference.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Vite/React frontend, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app in ThemeProvider and QueryClientProvider, handles Internet Identity authentication, profile setup, data migration, connection errors, and lazy-loads the Dashboard with user profile and role props.
frontend/src/components/AddFundTransacti: Modal dialog component for adding inflow or outflow transactions to a specific fund, with form validation and mutation via the useAddFundTransaction hook.
frontend/src/components/AddGoalDialog.ts: Modal dialog component for creating new business goals with description, target metrics, target date, and optional milestone tracking fields, submitted via the useAddGoal mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/AddInvestmentTra: A dialog component for adding investment fund transactions (payments or allocations) with fields for amount, transaction type, allocation type, and description. Submits via the `useAddInvestmentFundTransaction` mutation and shows toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/components/AddMaintenanceEx: A dialog component for logging maintenance expenses that validates fund balance, creates a maintenance expense record, and adds a corresponding ledger entry to deduct from the maintenance fund. Invalidates related React Query caches on success.
Renders memoized bar and line charts for monthly revenue/expenses and profit projections using Recharts and data from custom query hooks. Includes error handling with a retry button and loading states.
frontend/src/components/ArchivedInvestme: A static informational component that notifies users the old archived investments feature has been replaced by a new Investment Fund system, and provides a button to navigate to the Investment Fund tab.
frontend/src/components/BackupVersionsDi: A dialog that lists locally stored backup versions with options to download (as JSON) or delete each version, displaying metadata like timestamp and data size. Uses utility functions from `useQueries` to manage backup version state.
frontend/src/components/COGSSettings.tsx: A settings panel for configuring Cost of Goods Sold parameters including van fuel rates by city, generator fuel rate, additional pilot fee, and chemicals cost per hour. Saves configuration to localStorage and shows a save button when unsaved changes exist.
frontend/src/components/ContractsManagem: A full CRUD management UI for contracts, allowing admins to create, edit, delete, and filter contracts by name/status, with support for standardized services, area tiers, and agreed pricing.
frontend/src/components/CreateFundDialog: A dialog form for creating a new financial fund with fields for fund type, name, initial balance, spending limit, and approval threshold.
frontend/src/components/DataEntryForms.t: Provides forms and tables for adding, editing, and deleting jobs and expenses, with inline edit/delete dialogs and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/DataMigrationHan: Handles one-time migration of jobs, expenses, quotes, invoices, and goals from localStorage to the backend, showing progress and errors in a dialog.
frontend/src/components/DeleteConfirmDia: A reusable alert dialog component that prompts the user to confirm a delete action, with a loading state during deletion.
frontend/src/components/EditExpenseDialo: A dialog form for editing an existing expense's amount, date, category, and additional info, submitting updates via the useUpdateExpense hook.
frontend/src/components/EditFundDialog.t: A dialog component for editing an existing fund's name, balance, spending limit, approval threshold, and active status, using the useUpdateFund mutation with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/EditJobDialog.ts: A dialog component for editing a job's client name, revenue, date, and sector, using the useUpdateJob mutation with toast notifications on success or error.
frontend/src/components/ErrorPanel.tsx: A reusable card component that displays an error message with an optional retry button using a destructive alert style.
frontend/src/components/ExpensesManageme: A full expense management UI with search, category filtering, bulk selection, edit/delete actions, and a summary of total filtered expenses displayed in a table.
frontend/src/components/FinancialMetrics: Displays key financial metrics (revenue, profit, fund balances) as expandable cards with fund editing and transaction dialogs, using memoized calculations for performance.
A tabbed funds management dashboard showing operational funds, transactions, transfers, and alerts, with support for creating, editing, deleting funds, adding transactions, and attaching PDFs.
frontend/src/components/InvestmentFundMa: Displays an investment fund overview with summary cards (initial capital, current balance, total payments, total allocations) and a transaction history table. Admins can add new transactions via a dialog.
Provides a form for creating invoices by selecting a quote and entering customer details, then generates and downloads a PDF upon successful creation.
frontend/src/components/InvoicesList.tsx: Lists all invoices in a filterable, searchable table with options to download PDFs, toggle paid/pending status, and delete invoices (admin-only for delete).
frontend/src/components/JobCalendar.tsx: Renders a monthly calendar view of scheduled jobs, allowing navigation between months and clicking a job to open a details dialog.
frontend/src/components/JobDetailsDialog: A dialog for viewing and editing job details (customer info, financial fields) that restricts editing to admin users and submits updates via the useUpdateJob mutation.
frontend/src/components/KPIWidgets.tsx: Displays four KPI cards (Net Profit Trend, Job Completion, VAT Due, and a fund delta) by deriving metrics from financial, jobs, and invoices query hooks.
frontend/src/components/LoadingPanel.tsx: A simple card component that shows a spinning loader and a configurable message while data is being fetched.
frontend/src/components/MaintenanceManag: Renders a maintenance management section with fund balance, inflow/outflow summaries, and an expense log table, with an admin-only button to add new maintenance expenses.
frontend/src/components/MobileNav.tsx: A slide-out sheet navigation menu for mobile viewports that lists all app tabs and conditionally includes a Settings item for admins.
frontend/src/components/MonthlyReports.t: Displays a monthly financial report with selectable month/year, key metrics, goals tracking, and CSV export/print functionality.
frontend/src/components/PricingManagemen: Admin panel for viewing and editing tiered service rates across five cleaning service types, saving changes back to the backend via mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupDial: A modal dialog that collects a new user's name, email, and role (admin or viewer) on first launch and passes the data to a parent callback.
A React component that provides a multi-step quote calculator for cleaning services, computing pricing based on service type, area tiers, COGS (fuel, chemicals, pilot costs), add-ons, volume discounts, and VAT. It allows users to add multiple services, enter customer info, and save the resulting quote.
frontend/src/components/QuotesList.tsx: A React component that displays a filterable, searchable list of saved quotes with options to view details, download customer-facing or internal PDFs, and delete quotes. It also calculates and shows internal cost breakdowns per quote for admin users.
frontend/src/components/ReportingSection: A React component that displays unit economics summaries (revenue, expenses, profit per job) and provides buttons to export cash flow and unit economics data as CSV or PDF files using jobs and expenses data.
frontend/src/components/UserPreferencesD: A dialog component that lets users configure dashboard preferences including dark mode, layout style, and metric filters, persisting the settings via a save mutation and applying the theme immediately.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, returning an anonymous actor when unauthenticated and invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook that manage ICP AuthClient lifecycle, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status for use throughout the app.
frontend/src/hooks/usePdfAttachments.ts: Provides frontend-only IndexedDB utilities (savePdf, getPdf, deletePdf, hasAttachment) for storing and retrieving PDF attachments keyed by transaction ID for the Quotations Fund feature.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend data operations (jobs, expenses, quotes, invoices, funds, contracts, user profiles, preferences, etc.) with BigInt serialization helpers and configurable stale times.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind directives and defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens and sidebar variables.
frontend/src/lib/pdfGenerator.ts: Generates customer-facing quote PDFs by opening a styled HTML document in a new browser window using browser-native print APIs, with helpers for formatting service rates and totals.
frontend/src/lib/reportGenerator.ts: Generates cash flow reports from jobs and expenses data as either a downloadable CSV file or a printable HTML/PDF document opened in a new browser window.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main authenticated dashboard page that renders tabbed navigation across all major features (overview, funds, contracts, analytics, etc.) and handles data preloading, backup, and role-based access control.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Renders the login page for the DroneWash QuotePro admin dashboard, providing an Internet Identity login button with loading state and error toast handling.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
frontend/vite.config.ts: Vite build configuration that loads canister IDs from canister_ids.json and .dfx/local, injects them as environment variables, sets up a React plugin, path aliases, and a proxy for local ICP development.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state (version 13) for a DroneWash expense/fund management app, documenting completed PDF attachment steps, known frontend/backend sync issues, and v44 as the last known-good fallback.
